# PixelPay

> PixelPay — AI image & video generation API monetized via MPP (Machine Payments Protocol).

## Overview

PixelPay lets you generate images, edit images, transform styles, and create videos from text prompts using multiple AI providers (fal.ai, OpenAI, xAI). Each request is paid per-use through the Machine Payments Protocol (MPP) using Tempo blockchain with USDC stablecoins.

No API keys needed. Just pay per request.

## Payment (Dual Protocol)

PixelPay accepts two payment protocols on every paid endpoint. Both use USDC stablecoins.

### MPP (Machine Payments Protocol)
- Method: `tempo` (Tempo blockchain, chain ID 4217)
- Intent: `charge` (one-time per-request payment)
- Currency: `0x20c000000000000000000000b9537d11c60e8b50` (USDC on Tempo)
- Recipient: `0xf48c6E46358652fC77462d56d609B8bC7f4ba82e`
- Fee payer: Server pays gas (you only pay USDC amount)
- Headers: `WWW-Authenticate` → `Authorization: Payment` → `Payment-Receipt`

### x402 (Base / Coinbase Ecosystem)
- Chain: Base Mainnet (`eip155:8453`)
- Asset: `0x833589fCD6eDb6E08f4c7C32D4f71b54bdA02913` (USDC on Base)
- Recipient: `0xf48c6E46358652fC77462d56d609B8bC7f4ba82e`
- Facilitator: `https://x402.org/facilitator`
- Headers: `PAYMENT-REQUIRED` → `PAYMENT-SIGNATURE` → `PAYMENT-RESPONSE`
- Spec: x402 v2 (EIP-3009 TransferWithAuthorization)

### Tiered Pricing (per image/video)

| Model | Tier | Price (USDC) | Type |
|---|---|---|---|
| `fal-ai/flux/schnell` | schnell | $0.029 | image |
| `xai/grok-imagine-image` | grok | $0.039 | image |
| `fal-ai/flux/dev` | dev | $0.049 | image |
| `fal-ai/flux-kontext/text-to-image` | transform | $0.049 | transform |
| `fal-ai/recraft-v3` | recraft | $0.059 | image |
| `fal-ai/gpt-image-1/text-to-image` | gpt-image | $0.069 | image |
| `fal-ai/hidream-i1-full` | hidream | $0.079 | image |
| `fal-ai/ideogram/v3` | ideogram | $0.079 | image |
| `fal-ai/flux-pro/v1/fill` | edit | $0.079 | edit |
| `fal-ai/flux-pro/v1.1` | pro | $0.099 | image |
| `fal-ai/nano-banana-2` | premium | $0.14 | image |
| `fal-ai/nano-banana-pro` | premium | $0.19 | image |
| `fal-ai/bytedance/seedance/v1/pro/fast/text-to-video` | video | $0.35 | video |

**Premium models** require wallet payment — not available in free demo.

Default model: `fal-ai/flux/schnell` ($0.029).

## Payment Flow

### MPP Flow
1. `POST /v1/images/generate` with your prompt and model (no auth header)
2. Receive `402 Payment Required` with `WWW-Authenticate: Payment ...` challenge
3. Sign a Tempo transaction transferring the required USDC
4. Retry the same request with `Authorization: Payment <base64url-credential>`
5. Receive `200 OK` with generated images and a `Payment-Receipt` header

### x402 Flow
1. `POST /v1/images/generate` with your prompt and model (no auth header)
2. Receive `402 Payment Required` with `PAYMENT-REQUIRED` header (base64 JSON)
3. Sign a USDC TransferWithAuthorization on Base for the required amount
4. Retry the same request with `PAYMENT-SIGNATURE` header (base64 signed payload)
5. Receive `200 OK` with generated images and a `PAYMENT-RESPONSE` receipt header

Both protocols coexist — the 402 response includes headers for both. Use whichever your agent/wallet supports.

## Endpoints

### POST /v1/images/generate

Generate images from text prompts. 10 image models available.

**Request body** (JSON):
- `prompt` (string, required): Text describing the image
- `model` (string, optional): Model ID or "auto". Default: `fal-ai/flux/schnell`
- `image_size` (string, optional): Default: `landscape_4_3`
- `num_images` (integer, optional): 1-4. Default: 1
- `style` (string, optional): anime, cinematic, vintage, noir, cyberpunk, watercolor, oil-painting, pixel-art, minimalist, pop-art
- `enhance` (boolean, optional): Auto-enhance prompt
- `negative_prompt` (string, optional): Things to avoid
- `seed` (integer, optional): For reproducible results
- `image_urls` (array, optional): Reference images (model-dependent)

### POST /v1/images/edit

Edit an image via inpainting/outpainting using FLUX Fill. $0.079 USDC.

**Request body** (JSON):
- `prompt` (string, required): Edit instruction
- `image_url` (string, required): Source image URL
- `mask_url` (string, optional): Mask for targeted edit
- `image_size` (string, optional): Default: `landscape_4_3`

### POST /v1/images/transform

Transform/remix an image with style transfer using FLUX Kontext. $0.049 USDC.

**Request body** (JSON):
- `prompt` (string, required): Style/transform instruction
- `image_url` (string, optional): Reference image to transform
- `image_size` (string, optional): Default: `landscape_4_3`
- `num_images` (integer, optional): 1-4. Default: 1

### POST /v1/videos/generate

Generate a 5-second video using Seedance Fast. $0.35 USDC.

**Request body** (JSON):
- `prompt` (string, required): Motion/scene description
- `image_url` (string, optional): Starting frame image
- `seed` (integer, optional): For reproducible results

**Response:** `{ "video": { "url": "..." }, "prompt": "...", "model": "..." }`

### GET /v1/models

List all available models with capabilities, pricing, and type (image/edit/transform/video).

### GET /v1/prices

Get current pricing for all models.

### POST /v1/validate

Validate a prompt before paying.

### GET /v1/styles

List available style presets.

### POST /v1/images/upscale

Upscale an image 2x. `{"image_url": "..."}`

### GET /v1/gallery

Public image gallery (JSON).

### GET /health

Health check endpoint.

## Discovery

- OpenAPI spec: `GET /openapi.json`
- Agent instructions: `GET /agents.txt`
- LLM docs: `GET /llms.txt` (this file)
- Well-known: `GET /.well-known/mpp.json`

## Links

- Website: https://pixelpayapi.com
- MPP spec: https://mpp.dev
- fal.ai: https://fal.ai
- Tempo docs: https://docs.tempo.xyz
